title: tooling: add real-output autocoder eval v0
notes: Added the P3A real-output autocoder evaluator (corpus + evaluator + tests). The actual PR diff (changed_files) includes the corpus data file corpus/autocoder-real-output-v0.json, which is in forbidden_files (*.json) for task-005. The narrower scoped_files field lists the script and test files that fit inside the task-005 allowed_files pattern. scope_clean is false here because the script's scope check uses the full changed_files, not scoped_files. human_cleanup_required=true because Codex raised multiple P2 review threads (malformed result handling, matched_result_count semantics, corpus placeholder paths) that each required a follow-up commit before the PR could merge.
